creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 199240
updated patchfile patch-config_policy.xml

config/policy.xml has grown a new line with the content 'policy domain="resource" name="list-length"' since the patch was first created; thus the port fails during the patch phase.

This fixes the patch and unifies the new content under the existing line containing 'policy domain="coder"'.
